code:
%%{FinTech_TransactionQueue}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] state Pending {FinTech_LedgerService] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue] } state Approved {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [FinTech_LedgerService] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个评论审核的状态流转图，核心场景是金融交易相关的评论系统。整体从FinTech_TransactionQueue开始，评论创建后先进入Pending状态等待审核。
明白，Pending是入口状态。那审核通过和拒绝分别流向哪里？还有删除操作是在哪些状态下都能触发吗？
Pending可以Approve到Approved状态，也可以Reject到Rejected状态，另外Pending、Approved、Rejected这三个状态都能直接Delete。Deleted之后要指向FinTech_PaymentGateway作为终态。
好的，主状态流转已经画好。我注意到Pending、Approved、Rejected这三个都是复合状态，需要展开内部细节吗？
对，Pending内部要有FinTech_LedgerService指向AwaitingModeration，然后AwaitingModeration再指回FinTech_TransactionQueue形成闭环。Approved内部是FinTech_TransactionQueue指向Visible，Visible可以通过Update到Edited，Edited再返回Visible。
Pending和Approved的内部结构清楚了。那Rejected内部呢？
Rejected内部是FinTech_PaymentGateway指向Hidden，Hidden可以通过Add Rejection Reason到WithReason，最后WithReason指向FinTech_LedgerService。另外需要在四个主状态右侧加上注释说明。

全部完成了。Pending的注释是"Comments start in Pending state and await moderation"，Approved是"Approved comments are visible and can be edited"，Rejected是"Rejected comments are hidden with optional rejection reason"，Deleted是"Deleted comments are permanently removed"。请确认是否符合预期？
确认无误，这个状态图完整覆盖了评论从创建、审核、展示到删除的全生命周期，各金融服务的交互关系也体现清楚了。
